name: Vercel Geometric
description: High contrast geometry with sharp corners, ultra-dark backgrounds, and bold, tech-focused typography.
promptBlock: Style: Vercel Geometric. Pure black background (#000000) and bright white foreground text (#ffffff). Use Geist Sans typography. Buttons and cards must feature perfectly sharp corners (0px border radius) and thin dark borders (#333333). Primary elements are white, secondary actions are dim grey (#888888). Accent colors can be electric blue (#0070f3). Keep the design block-based and highly structured.
